category_sources: Official Television docs describe it as a fast, portable, hackable fuzzy finder for the terminal.
source_facts.description says Television is a general purpose fuzzy finder TUI.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses the display name Television.
docs_sources: Official Television documentation site is alexpasmantier.github.io/television/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/alexpasmantier/television, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
